title: SOL 12pk Gel Air Fresheners - Pacific Surf & Fresh Berries Scents, Odour Eliminator Room Fresheners, Bathroom Air Fresheners, Toilet Deodorisers, Long-Lasting Room Fragrance for Home & Office
features: Eliminate A Dodgy Odour In The Room - Using these air fresheners for home, get a Pacific Surf & Fresh Berries hit every time you open the door. This odour eliminator is handy to have around the house. Put one in your bathroom, bedroom & kitchen.

Pleasant Smell & Not Overpowering - Our air freshener for home is better than spraying. Put aroma as room fresheners for home, air fresheners for bathroom or toilet air freshener. A lovely fragrance will come out instead of a musty damp smell.

Help To Reduce Pet Odours - No need to worry your house smells of animals. Our room air freshener is an odour neutraliser so it does help with pet odours at your house. This air freshner is a good option to cover up the smell of your cats litter tray

Your Go-To Room Freshener - Pop one of these in your wardrobes or as a bathroom air freshener to give you a wonderful outdoor smell inside. These air fresheners for home can also be hidden in rooms. The smell is amazing in any room or wardrobe.

Lasts A Long Time - These 12 packs offer 6pcs of Berries & 6pcs of Ocean fragrance. Our air fresheners for home smell amazing. This can last for weeks & still goes strong. Smells lovely even as your bathroom freshener.

These air fresheners neutralise unpleasant odours with a refreshing Pacific Surf & Fresh Berries fragrance, making any room smell fresh and inviting. Can these air fresheners help with pet smells? Yes, these air fresheners work effectively as odour neutralisers, helping to mask pet smells and keep your home smelling fresh. Where should I place these air fresheners in my home? Place them in bathrooms, bedrooms, kitchens, or wardrobes. They're versatile enough to freshen any room while being discreetly hidden. How long does the scent from these air fresheners last? Each air freshener in the 12-pack offers a long-lasting fragrance that can persist for weeks, ensuring your home stays fresh. What scents are included in this pack? The pack includes 6 Pacific Surf and 6 Fresh Berries air fresheners, providing a lovely variety to keep your home smelling amazing.
